name: GET /api/leads/stale - List leads stuck in non-terminal stages
description: Operator monitoring endpoint. Returns every lead whose updated_at predates `now - days` (default 7) and whose stage is not in the workflow's terminal stages — i.e. leads that haven't progressed in N days. The ?days=<n> querystring tunes the threshold; the ?workflow=<slug> querystring picks which terminal stages to exclude. Empty result is the success state — no stale leads. Powers the Stale Leads panel on the admin-cockpit Dashboard.

testCases.name: List stale leads with the default 7-day threshold
